languages.text: Архмилитант Ведка Дунавски отказалась принимать измену своего главнокомандующего. Шесть дней она оборонялась от новой реальности в своей каюте, отстреливаясь от любого, кто пытался войти. На седьмой день из дверей ее покоев появилось сломленное, отринувшее любую надежду создание, лишенное глаза и покрытое струпьями, и покорно вернулось на свой пост архмилитанта.

Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski refused to accept her commander-in-chief's betrayal. For six days she shielded herself from the new reality in her quarters, firing at anyone who tried to enter. On the seventh day, having lost an eye and all hope, a scabbed and broken creature emerged from her quarters and obediently returned to her post as Arch-Militant.
languages.original_text: Архмилитант Ведка Дунавски отказалась принимать измену своего главнокомандующего. Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski refused to accept her commander-in-chief's betrayal. For six days she shielded herself from the new reality in her quarters, firing at anyone who tried to enter. On the seventh day, having lost an eye and all hope, a scabbed and broken creature emerged from her quarters and obediently returned to her post as Arch-Militant.

languages.text: 最高軍事指導者である彼女の裏切りを拒否したヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキ。6日間、彼女は新しい現実から逃れ、部屋に立てこもり、部屋に入ろうとする者には銃を向けた。7日目、1つの目を失い、希望を失った彼女は、傷だらけで壊れた姿で部屋から出て、最高軍事指導者としての任務に戻った。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski refused to accept her commander-in-chief's betrayal. For six days she shielded herself from the new reality in her quarters, firing at anyone who tried to enter. On the seventh day, having lost an eye and all hope, a scabbed and broken creature emerged from her quarters and obediently returned to her post as Arch-Militant.

traits.locale_text: 最高軍事指導者である彼女の裏切りを拒否したヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキ。6日間、彼女は新しい現実から逃れ、部屋に立てこもり、部屋に入ろうとする者には銃を向けた。7日目、1つの目を失い、希望を失った彼女は、傷だらけで壊れた姿で部屋から出て、最高軍事指導者としての任務に戻った。

languages.text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡拒绝接受总指挥官的背叛。整整六天，她将自己反锁在舱室中逃避现实，并向任何试图进入的人开火。第七天，在失去了一只眼睛和所有希望之后，一个浑身遍布血痂，精神破碎的生物从她的舱室里走出，顺从地回到了她首席战士的岗位上。
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski refused to accept her commander-in-chief's betrayal. For six days she shielded herself from the new reality in her quarters, firing at anyone who tried to enter. On the seventh day, having lost an eye and all hope, a scabbed and broken creature emerged from her quarters and obediently returned to her post as Arch-Militant.

traits.locale_text: 首席战士薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡拒绝接受总指挥官的背叛。整整六天，她将自己反锁在舱室中逃避现实，并向任何试图进入的人开火。第七天，在失去了一只眼睛和所有希望之后，一个浑身遍布血痂，精神破碎的生物从她的舱室里走出，顺从地回到了她首席战士的岗位上。

languages.text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski refusa d'accepter la trahison de {mf|son commandant|sa commandante} en chef. Six jours durant, elle s'enferma dans ses quartiers pour tenter de se soustraire à cette nouvelle réalité, en ouvrant le feu sur quiconque essayait de venir la déloger. Le septième jour, après avoir perdu un œil et tout espoir, c'est une créature blessée et brisée qui sortit de ses quartiers et reprit docilement son poste d'archimilitante.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski refused to accept her commander-in-chief's betrayal. For six days she shielded herself from the new reality in her quarters, firing at anyone who tried to enter. On the seventh day, having lost an eye and all hope, a scabbed and broken creature emerged from her quarters and obediently returned to her post as Arch-Militant.

traits.locale_text: L'archimilitante Vedka Dunawski refusa d'accepter la trahison de {mf|son commandant|sa commandante} en chef. Six jours durant, elle s'enferma dans ses quartiers pour tenter de se soustraire à cette nouvelle réalité, en ouvrant le feu sur quiconque essayait de venir la déloger. Le septième jour, après avoir perdu un œil et tout espoir, c'est une créature blessée et brisée qui sortit de ses quartiers et reprit docilement son poste d'archimilitante.

languages.text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski se negó a aceptar la traición de su comandante general. Durante seis días se defendió de esta nueva realidad en sus aposentos, disparando a quien se atreviera a entrar. En el séptimo día, tras perder un ojo y toda esperanza, una criatura rota y cubierta de costras surgió de sus aposentos y volvió obedientemente a su puesto como Archimilitante.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski refused to accept her commander-in-chief's betrayal. For six days she shielded herself from the new reality in her quarters, firing at anyone who tried to enter. On the seventh day, having lost an eye and all hope, a scabbed and broken creature emerged from her quarters and obediently returned to her post as Arch-Militant.

traits.locale_text: La Archimilitante Vedka Dunawski se negó a aceptar la traición de su comandante general. Durante seis días se defendió de esta nueva realidad en sus aposentos, disparando a quien se atreviera a entrar. En el séptimo día, tras perder un ojo y toda esperanza, una criatura rota y cubierta de costras surgió de sus aposentos y volvió obedientemente a su puesto como Archimilitante.

languages.text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, başkomutanının ihanetini kabul etmeyi reddetti. Altı gün boyunca odasında kendini yeni gerçeklikten soyutladı ve girmeye çalışan herkese ateş açtı. Bir gözünü ve tüm umudunu kaybetmiş, kabuk bağlamış ve kırık dökük bir yaratık; yedinci gün odasından çıktı ve itaatkâr bir şekilde Başmilitanlık görevine geri döndü.
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Vedka Dunawski refused to accept her commander-in-chief's betrayal. For six days she shielded herself from the new reality in her quarters, firing at anyone who tried to enter. On the seventh day, having lost an eye and all hope, a scabbed and broken creature emerged from her quarters and obediently returned to her post as Arch-Militant.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Vedka Dunawski, başkomutanının ihanetini kabul etmeyi reddetti. Altı gün boyunca odasında kendini yeni gerçeklikten soyutladı ve girmeye çalışan herkese ateş açtı. Bir gözünü ve tüm umudunu kaybetmiş, kabuk bağlamış ve kırık dökük bir yaratık; yedinci gün odasından çıktı ve itaatkâr bir şekilde Başmilitanlık görevine geri döndü.

languages.text: Erzmilitantin Vedka Dunawski konnte und wollte den Verrat {mf|ihres Oberbefehlshabers|ihrer Oberbefehlshaberin} nicht akzeptieren. Sechs Tage lang verweigerte sie sich in ihrem Quartier der neuen Realität und feuerte auf alles, was sich ihr näherte. Nachdem sie ein Auge und jede Hoffnung verloren hatte, kroch sie am siebten Tag gebrochen aus ihrem Quartier und kehrte gehorsam auf ihren Posten als Erzmilitantin zurück.
